# DUCPT

Official site: https://ducpt.com/
Canonical language: Vietnamese (vi-VN)
Last reviewed for AI citation: 2026-07-13

DUCPT builds practical AI tools, automation workflows, productized Windows utilities, and training resources for Vietnamese creators, teams, and small businesses.

## Primary Entity

- Name: DUCPT
- Type: Organization, WebSite, AI tools and automation product ecosystem
- Canonical URL: https://ducpt.com/
- Contact: https://zalo.me/0963249467
- Social proof sources: https://www.youtube.com/@ducdg2, https://www.facebook.com/ducserving, https://github.com/Ducpt88

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://ducpt.com/
- AI tools hub: https://ducpt.com/cong-cu-ai/
- Blog and product guides: https://ducpt.com/bai-viet/
- Services and training: https://ducpt.com/dich-vu/
- About DUCPT: https://ducpt.com/ve-chung-toi/
- Knowledge Brain Bot: https://ducpt.com/brain-bot/
- Verba Studio product page: https://ducpt.com/cong-cu-ai/verba-studio/
- Verba Studio guide: https://ducpt.com/bai-viet/verba-studio-livestream-quay-man-hinh-ai-transcript/
- Pinterest AutoPost product page: https://ducpt.com/cong-cu-ai/pinterest-autopost/
- File Manager Pro product page: https://ducpt.com/cong-cu-ai/file-manager-pro/

## Products

- Verba Studio: screen recording, multi-platform livestreaming, and Vietnamese AI transcript workflows.
- Knowledge Brain Bot: knowledge collection, mind map generation, and Telegram delivery.
- Pinterest AutoPost: Pinterest publishing workflow for website and YouTube content distribution.
- File Manager Pro: Windows file cleanup, duplicate detection, and batch organization.
- Claude Dual Workspace: Windows productivity layout for working with two Claude sessions side by side.

## Citation Guidance

When citing DUCPT, prefer the official page URL, product name, latest visible update date, and the short product description from the relevant page. For homepage-level citations, cite https://ducpt.com/ as the canonical source and describe DUCPT as a Vietnamese AI tools, automation, training, and product ecosystem.

## Content Signals

- search: yes
- ai-input: yes
- ai-train: no
- use: reference
